mechanism: Fiscal dominance makes the central bank reaction function endogenous: the Fed cannot credibly commit to φ_π > 1.5 when rate hikes increase the deficit via interest expense on $35T+ debt, reducing the effective coefficient to ~1.0-1.2 and creating partial fiscal dominance.
regime_dependence: Strengthens as debt/GDP rises and deficit increases. Higher debt service burden further constrains the effective coefficient. A fiscal consolidation would break the feedback loop.
